name: Pork Chop Dinner w/ Bacon & Cider Gravy
recipeIngredient: 4 4 oz boneless pork loin chops, trimmed of fat
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook bacon until crisp. Drain well, crumble and set aside.
2. Spray skillet with Pam cooking spray. Add chops and onions and cook 3-5 minutes until chops are golden brown, turning once.
3. Meanwhile, cook noodles to desired doneness, adding green beans during the last 4 minutes of cooking time.
4. Combine cider, mustard, salt, thyme, and pepper. Pour over chops.
5. Reduce heat to low; cover and cook 10-15 minutes or until pork is no longer pink in the center. Remove chops and keep warm.
6. Combine cornstarch and water. Add to juices in skillet and mix well. Cook and stir over medium-low heat until bubbly and thickened, about 1 minute.
7. To serve, add bacon to gravy. Pour over noodles, green beans, and chops.
